title: Ancient Shrine
flavor: A worn altar pulses with faint magic. Power can be bought — for a price.

options.label: Offer HP (20)
options.desc: Sacrifice 20 HP for a random boon.

title: Healing Spring
flavor: A clear pool bubbles up from the stone floor. Its waters shimmer with life.

options.label: Fill your flask
options.desc: Heal 25 HP and gain +1 regen per tick.

title: Fallen Champion
flavor: The corpse of a warrior lies here, still clutching their belongings.

options.label: Take their boon
options.desc: Absorb the power of a fallen hero.

title: Dark Bargain
flavor: A disembodied voice whispers from the shadows, offering terrible power.

options.label: Refuse the voice
options.desc: Nothing happens. Some deals aren't worth making.
options.resultMsg: You refuse the dark voice. It fades, frustrated.

title: Tome of Knowledge
flavor: A dusty tome lies open to a marked page, its text glowing faintly.

title: Abandoned Cache
flavor: A hidden stash behind a loose stone. Someone left in a hurry.

options.label: Grab quickly
options.desc: 50/50: gain 2000 gold OR trigger a trap (−30 HP).

title: Mystic Font
flavor: Runes carved into the floor glow with trapped rift energy.

options.label: Purify
options.desc: Cure all status effects and gain poison immunity.

title: Cursed Armory
flavor: Weapons of the fallen gleam with dark purpose.

options.label: Take the cursed blade
options.desc: +8 ATK — but suffer 3 turns of poison.

options.label: Walk away
options.desc: Some power is not worth the price.
options.resultMsg: You leave the cursed weapons untouched.

title: Rift Scholar
flavor: A fractured echo of intelligence lingers here.
